# Version 4.150.1
> **Upstream bug fix sync** · Released July 14, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.150.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.150.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.150.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.1 delivers upstream Skia m150 bug fixes to the stable channel.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Upstream m150 bug fixes backported** — Cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m150 branch address stability and rendering issues. ([#4379](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4379), [#4429](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4429))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1.1

No HarfBuzzSharp binding changes shipped in this release — it rebuilds the same HarfBuzz as the previous line.
